candidates.first_smoke: Done: 93-frame/1-step student-only Transfer smoke generated video on GPU 0 through cosmos25_py310 worker. Next: solve ai parity imports/native packages or replace env with bridge-owned worker image.

model_index_evidence.local_assets: BF16 checkpoint files and official runtime roots are present.

transformer_10_evidence: cosmos25_py310 imports pass for official Predict/Transfer runtime roots.
Local checkpoint overrides are documented so the official registry does not download defaults.
legacy_model_bridge no-generation launch-plan worker now validates official imports, local inputs, and checkpoint overrides in cosmos25_py310.
Bounded generation attempt on GPU 1 and GPUs 1,2 resolved side assets but OOMed before denoising because official DMD2 inference constructs student, teacher, and fake-score networks.

Student-only DMD2 bridge skips teacher/fake-score construction, borrows GPU memory for text encoding, handles tokenizer inner-model device movement, and generated a 93-frame smoke output on one 24 GiB GPU.

candidates.first_smoke: Load-only launch-plan smoke with local checkpoint override, then a tiny low-resolution generation with offload enabled.

model_index_evidence.local_assets: BF16 post-trained checkpoint path is known; official runtime checkout validates.

candidates.recommended_bridge: Reuse the Cosmos 2.5 official worker with model-specific checkpoint and offload knobs.
transformer_10_evidence: Same worker preflight lane as Transfer 2.5 passes.
Full generation remains pending because VRAM/offload behavior needs validation.
legacy_model_bridge no-generation launch-plan worker now validates official imports, local inputs, and checkpoint overrides in cosmos25_py310.

R1.5 and Pro variants validate with modern AutoTokenizer or remote-code loaders.

candidates.first_smoke: Run the same session/tensor inspection smoke as v2.3 and compare input/output names.

metadata.review_scope: Legacy models not yet fully integrated in legacy_model_bridge, ranked by local asset presence, transformer_10 smoke evidence, and bridge contract clarity.
metadata.selection_rule: Prefer candidates with concrete local paths and verified load/component/preflight evidence before models that still need a missing runtime package or incomplete checkpoint.
